primary_operations.name: consume
primary_operations.sdk_call: resp = self._client.receive_message(QueueUrl=queue_url, MaxNumberOfMessages=1, WaitTimeSeconds=10); msgs = resp.get('Messages', []); return msgs[0]['Body'].encode('utf-8') if msgs else None

primary_operations.name: poll
primary_operations.sdk_call: resp = self._client.receive_message(QueueUrl=queue_url, MaxNumberOfMessages=1, WaitTimeSeconds=0); msgs = resp.get('Messages', []); return msgs[0]['Body'].encode('utf-8') if msgs else None

code_style_notes: boto3 SQS clients are NOT thread-safe; instantiate per-thread
WaitTimeSeconds enables long polling — preferred over short polling for cost
after consume, the message is invisible for VisibilityTimeout seconds; explicit delete required
